scope: Cycle 17: Bug hunt C16 (llm_adapter echo_memory wiring gap) + BUGFIX-027 + feat GM few-shot example 3

bugs_found.description: build_context_enrichment() did NOT read echo_memory data despite C16 status claiming it was wired. echo_memory was populated in store_run.gd but never passed through context_builder.build_full_context() or build_narrative_context() to the LLM prompts. Veteran players had no cross-run narrative memory reaching the LLM.
bugs_found.fix: Added echo_memory + total_runs to both context_builder.build_full_context() and merlin_llm_adapter.build_narrative_context(). build_context_enrichment() now formats deaths_by_biome, dominant_factions_seen, veteran status, and MOS tension zone into user prompt.

overall_assessment: Cycle 17: Bug hunt C16 found 1 HIGH gap (echo_memory never reaching LLM prompts). Fixed across 4 files. Feature: 3rd GM few-shot example for end-game (PROGRESS_MISSION + high rep swings). 27 total bugs fixed across 17 cycles.
